articles.title: Micron Stock Falls Even After Analyst Forecasts Strong Demand and $1,600 Target - Barron's
articles.description: Micron stock is falling to kick off the third quarter but memory-chip prices were higher in June.
articles.content:
Micron Technologystock fell sharply Wednesday amid a wider selloff in technology stocks. However, prices for its memory chips are only heading upward.
